prompt:
Evaluate the following HTTP response headers for security compliance. Identify missing or misconfigured headers:

Content-Type: text/html
X-Powered-By: Express
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *

mock_result.response:
Security Header Audit:

Missing Headers [CRITICAL]:
- Content-Security-Policy: Missing — allows XSS attacks
- Strict-Transport-Security: Missing — no HTTPS enforcement
- X-Frame-Options: Missing — clickjacking vulnerability
- X-Content-Type-Options: Missing — MIME sniffing attacks

Misconfigured Headers [HIGH]:
- Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — overly permissive CORS allows any origin
- X-Powered-By: Express — discloses server technology; remove this header

Recommendations: Add helmet.js middleware to Express for automatic security header injection. Fix CORS to allowlist specific trusted origins.
